personal.name: Keerthik Raja
personal.summary: Results-driven Data Analyst with an Industrial Engineering background and 10+ months of hands-on experience. Built shift-level forecast models enabling same-day production recovery decisions and designed Power BI dashboards that surfaced revenue-critical insights adopted as formal strategic priorities. Proficient in SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy), Excel, and Power BI, with growing exposure to AI workflow automation and financial data analysis.

highlights: Built a 6-page interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze securitisation portfolios, covering Credit Risk Analysis, Recovery Analysis, Collateral Analysis, and Vintage Performance Analysis.
Created interactive reports using Power BI, Power Query, DAX, and advanced visualizations to improve portfolio monitoring and performance evaluation.
Delivered meaningful insights through data modeling, KPI tracking, and user-friendly dashboard design.
Developed a 2-page interactive Power BI dashboard for Retail Sales Data Analysis, providing actionable insights into Customer Response, Revenue Performance, Sales Trends, and Customer Activity.
Created interactive reports using Power BI, DAX, and Power Query, incorporating KPIs, slicers, and dynamic visualizations to monitor sales performance and customer behavior.
Transformed retail sales data into meaningful business insights, enabling data-driven decision-making and performance tracking.

Built shift-level production forecast models in Excel enabling same-day corrective planning; consistently closed an average production shortfall of 12% by the following shift through real-time data-driven adjustments.
Automated operator assignment audits using VLOOKUP and XLOOKUP across 5+ production lines, eliminating error-prone manual cross-checks and significantly reducing daily assignment mismatches.
Delivered end-of-shift variance analysis reports quantifying root causes of production losses; recommendations adopted by the operations team within the same week, driving gains across 3 bottlenecks.
Handled PCB assembly, soldering, and quality testing to support hardware reliability and efficient production operations.
Developed practical experience in troubleshooting, process accuracy, and maintaining quality standards within a fast-paced manufacturing environment.

details.description: Due to confidentiality agreements, dashboard visuals cannot be publicly shared. The analysis covers structured asset-backed securities portfolio health, credit risk metrics, recovery analysis, and vintage performance analysis to evaluate portfolio performance.
achievements: Data Processing & Quality: Managed and sanitized a 6,000+ record securitisation dataset using advanced SQL - handling missing values, resolving structural inconsistencies, and normalizing schemas to produce a clean analytics-ready data model.
EDA & Insights: Performed comprehensive EDA in Excel to identify portfolio trends, segment asset performance by vintage and collateral type, and establish baseline KPIs for stakeholder dashboards.
Visualization & Analysis: Designed a 6-page interactive Power BI dashboard integrating Credit Risk Analysis, Recovery Analysis, Collateral Analysis, and Vintage Performance Analysis.

details.description: Developed a 2-page interactive Power BI dashboard for Retail Sales Data Analysis. Due to limited data availability constraints, analysis was focused on baseline operational performance, customer activity, and MoM transaction trends.
achievements: Data Constraint Management: Structured and cleaned a restricted retail dataset, addressing limited data availability to establish baseline operational metrics.
Operational Metric Tracking: Visualized key KPIs including 125K total customers, 14K responses, 8M total revenue, and 64.99 average transaction value.
Customer Segmentation: Discovered that Medium spending customer band generated 61.8% ($5M) of total revenue, guiding targeted retention strategies.

details.description: A comprehensive end-to-end sales analysis dashboard that tracks revenue trends, discount implications, product reviews, and category-level profit margins to optimize supply chains and inventory.
achievements: Data Cleaning & Feature Engineering: Cleaned and standardized a 1,000-row raw sales dataset; engineered features using SQL CTEs, multi-table joins, and aggregations to build a unified query-optimized data model.

Advanced DAX Measures: Developed 6 custom DAX measures covering revenue growth rate, discount impact, product review scores, and category-level profitability; implemented dynamic slicers and drill-through filters.

Business Insights: Discovered that the Dresses category generated disproportionately higher revenue relative to its SKU count - insight adopted as a formal strategic priority, driving increased inventory allocation.

Outstanding performance in science and mathematics.
